name: TrollInstallerDark
subtitle: TrollInstallerDark is a TrollStore installer for arm64 iPhone and iPad devices running iOS 15.7.2 to iOS 15.8.x. Based on TrollInstallerX and powered by the DarkSword kernel exploit.
description:
TrollInstallerDark is a modified version of TrollInstallerX by Alfie that uses the DarkSword kernel exploit to install TrollStore on supported iPhone and iPad devices.

It supports arm64 devices running iOS 15.7.2 to iOS 15.8.x and installs TrollStore directly to your Home Screen without needing a jailbreak. The app also sets up a persistence helper inside a system app you choose, helping TrollStore stay active after rebooting your device.

You can install the TrollInstallerDark IPA using sideloading tools like SideStore , KSign , iLoader , or PlumeImpactor . An open-source download is available on the GitHub TrollInstallerDark IPA Releases page .

v 1.0

Want the latest updates, new releases, and support? Join our Telegram channel and stay connected! 👉 Join us on Telegram

If you’re looking for alternatives to TrollInstallerDark to install TrollStore on your iPhone or iPad, there are several free tools you can try.

Top Alternatives

These alternatives make it easy to install TrollStore without a jailbreak. They are commonly used on devices running iOS 14 – 15 to iOS 17 , depending on compatibility.

Each tool offers a slightly different experience, so you can choose the one that best fits your device and needs.

Step 01. install AltStore on your iOS device.

Step 02. Download the TrollInstallerX IPA file.

Open the AltStore app on your device and go to the “My Apps” tab.

Step 03. Tap on the plus “+” icon at the top, then browse and select the TrollInstallerX IPA file that you downloaded.

Step 04. If it’s your first time using AltStore, you will be asked to enter your Apple ID and password. AltStore requires it to sign the app so it can be installed. We recommend you use a burner account.

Step 05. The app will begin to install and once completed, you can open it from your Home screen.

Step 01. Download the latest version of Sideloadly for Windows or macOS and install it on your PC.

Step 02. Download the TrollInstallerDark IPA file from this page and save it to your computer.

Step 03. Connect your iOS device to your computer using a USB cable.

Step 04. Open the Sideloadly app on your PC.

You may be prompted to install the Mail Plug-in. Click the “Yes” button to continue.

Enter your Apple ID email under the “Apple account” field.

Step 05. Drag and drop the TrollInstallerDark IPA file into the IPA field shown on the left side of the interface. The field is represented by an IPA image.

Step 06. Click the “Start” button to begin the sideloading and installing the IPA.

When prompted, enter your Apple ID password. The tool uses your Apple ID to sideload the app. We recommend you use a burner account.

Step 07. Sideloadly will begin installing TrollInstallerDark IPA on your iOS device.

Step 08. Once the app is installed, don’t open it yet. You must first verify your Apple ID profile if it’s your first time using Sideloadly. To do it, go to Settings > General > Device Management. Tap on your Apple ID and press the Trust button. Tap on Trust again from the popup alert.

Step 09. Now go to the Home screen to open the installed app.

name: TrollDecrypt
subtitle: TrollDecryptJB is a powerful jailbreak tool that decrypts and extracts iOS apps using an LLDB-based method, allowing older iOS devices (14–16) to access apps built for newer iOS versions.
description:
TrollDecryptJB is a powerful iOS app decryption tool designed for jailbroken devices . It allows you to decrypt and extract apps that require higher iOS versions — like iOS 18 or iOS 26 — while still running older firmware such as iOS 14–16.

This tool is based on the original TrollDecrypt app (for TrollStore users) but offers deeper system-level access using an LLDB-based decryption method developed by 82flex .

TrollDecryptJB lets you decrypt iOS apps directly from your device by attaching to the app process before Apple’s FairPlay encryption loads. This unique timing allows the tool to dump the unencrypted app binary (Mach-O) and frameworks before protection is applied.

With TrollDecryptJB, you can:

In short, TrollDecrypt is about ease , while TrollDecryptJB offers full control and access .

Apple’s FairPlay protection and frequent updates make it hard to analyze or modify modern apps. TrollDecryptJB solves that by giving developers and researchers the ability to decrypt and inspect apps safely on older, jailbroken devices.

Whether you’re a tweak developer , security researcher , or just exploring how apps work, TrollDecryptJB helps preserve access and compatibility — even as Apple tightens restrictions.

You can download TrollDecryptJB IPA or DEB directly to your computer and install it on your iPhone or iPad using tools like Cydia , Sileo , TrollStore , AltStore , SideStore , iLoader or Sideloadly .

These tools make it easy to install TrollDecryptJB on both jailbroken and non-jailbroken devices, depending on your setup.

name: VansonMod
subtitle: VansonMod is a powerful memory editing tool for iOS, letting users scan, modify, and freeze live app memory on jailbroken or TrollStore devices.
description:
VansonMod is an advanced memory editing tool for iPhone and iPad, developed by vaenshine and available as an open-source project on GitHub. It allows users to scan, edit, and control live memory values inside running iOS apps.

Unlike basic hex editors, VansonMod is designed specifically for iOS system behavior, including ASLR (Address Space Layout Randomization) . This makes it especially useful for reverse engineers, researchers, and advanced users who need precise control over app memory.

VansonMod runs directly on the device and does not require a constant PC connection , making it ideal for on-the-go testing and analysis.

VansonMod works by attaching to active app processes and reading their memory in real time. Instead of relying on fixed memory addresses, it uses Relative Virtual Addresses (RVA) .

This means you can find and modify the same values even after app restarts or system reboots, where memory locations normally change.

Requirements

• Live memory scanning – Search for numbers, text, or values inside running apps • Fuzzy search mode – Track values that change over time (timers, counters, scores) • Real-time memory editing – Modify values instantly and see results immediately • Freeze values – Lock a memory value so the app cannot change it • RVA support – Reliable memory offsets across app restarts • Multiple data types – Supports 4-byte & 8-byte integers, floats, and doubles • Bookmarks – Save important memory offsets for later use • Jump to address – Navigate directly to absolute or relative memory locations • On-device usage – No PC or debugger required

The interface is intentionally technical and data-focused , designed for users who understand memory structures and binary values.

VansonMod is fully open source , allowing the community to review its code. This is important because memory editors require deep system access.

To reduce risk, the tool includes basic safety checks to prevent writing to protected or critical system memory areas, helping avoid accidental crashes.

You can download the latest VansonMod IPA from the official source.

v 2.3

Want the latest updates, new releases, and support? Join our Telegram channel and stay connected! 👉 Join us on Telegram

Recent VansonMod releases focus on:

• Faster memory scanning (large scans now complete much quicker) • Improved RVA calculations for apps with multiple frameworks • Better handling of sub-libraries and shared components • Reduced memory leaks inside VansonMod itself • Improved stability during long sessions

The tool is still in active development , with frequent test builds and fixes.

name: TrollVNC
subtitle: TrollVNC lets you remotely access and control your iPhone or iPad screen.
description:
TrollVNC for iOS – Remote Access Made Simple

TrollVNC is a powerful VNC server for iOS that allows you to remotely view and control your iPhone or iPad screen from another device. It supports iOS 16 up to iOS 17.0 and works smoothly on devices compatible with TrollStore .

Originally launched as a free, open-source hobby project , TrollVNC gave users full access to its source code. You could download, modify, and even compile it yourself. With version 2.0 and later , TrollVNC shifted to a paid model on Havoc ($6.99) , offering pre-built binaries, updates, and dedicated support. However, the last free release ( v1.6 ) is still available for those who prefer the open-source experience.

TrollVNC remains licensed under GPLv2 , so the source code is publicly accessible on GitHub . This makes it a unique tool — blending the flexibility of open-source software with the convenience of ongoing paid support for users who want stability and updates.

Whether you’re testing, troubleshooting, or just want to manage your device remotely, TrollVNC provides an easy way to control your iOS screen without touching the device. Developed by Own Goal Studio , known for tools like ColorfulWallpaperX , XXTouchElite, and TrollRecorder , TrollVNC has quickly become a must-have utility for advanced iOS users.

👉 TrollVNC is perfect for developers, testers, or anyone who needs secure and reliable remote access on iOS devices.

name: TimeBomb 2
subtitle: TimeBomb 2 IPA causes a spinlock panic on iOS 15 arm64e, showing that it’s not just a Dopamine Jailbreak issue.
description:
TimeBomb 2 IPA, which is a TrollStore app that can trigger a spinlock panic on demand (on supported versions, such as iOS 15 arm64e), even when the device is not jailbroken, thereby proving it’s not an issue with Dopamine Jailbreak .

T imeBomb 2 IPA is a TrollStore app that forces the spinlock panic bug on iOS 15 (arm64e) stock devices , proving it’s not just a jailbreak issue.

Download TimeBomb 2 IPA from your computer to install it using Altstore, Sideloadly, TrollStore, Scarlet, e-Sign, 3uTools, or MapleSign.

v 1.0.0

iOS shares memory regions across processes , but a bug in iOS 15’s kernel (PMAP_CS) causes a race condition when certain pages are modified. This can lead to a deadlock , causing the system to panic and crash .

🔹 This issue mainly affects jailbroken devices but can also occur on stock iOS when debugging apps . 🔹 Fixed in iOS 16 , where Apple patched the bug by improving pmap_cs_enforce handling.

name: AppDump
subtitle: AppDump lets you convert App Store apps into IPA files, so you can install them with TrollStore.
description:
AppDump3 (previously AppDump2) is a simple yet powerful tool that lets you decrypt iOS apps and save them as IPA files—no jailbreak required! 📱💾 Whether you’re a developer looking to tweak apps or a user who wants to back up and share IPAs, AppDump makes the entire process quick and effortless.

Built for TrollStore 2, AppDump3 works on iOS 15 through iOS 16 and may even support iOS 17 devices. The app takes full advantage of TrollStore’s system-level abilities to decrypt App Store apps right from your device, allowing you to export them as binaries or complete IPA packages.

Once installed through TrollStore, AppDump3 appears on your Home Screen. If developer mode is disabled, the app may fail to open—so make sure it’s turned on.

Inside AppDump3, you’ll find a clean, easy-to-navigate list of all apps installed on your device. You can scroll or quickly search by app name or bundle ID. From there, you can decrypt IPAs, extract binaries, explore app paths, or even run the chosen app directly.

AppDump3 also includes advanced settings, such as hiding paths, adjusting language, bypassing device and firmware limits, enabling file sharing, and more. Recent versions even add location spoofing by entering custom GPS coordinates—perfect for navigation apps, games, and social platforms.

Designed by GBLW and built on the TrollDecryptor prototype from wh1te4ever, AppDump3 stands out with its intuitive UI, smooth performance, and full TrollStore compatibility. Best of all, it works without jailbreak—something traditional tools like DumpDecrypter, BFdecrypt, CrackerXI+, and iGameGod cannot offer outside of jailbroken environments.

name: OTADisabler
subtitle: Turn off iOS updates from iOS 9 to iOS 18+ using OTADisabler IPA on TrollStore!
description:
OTADisabler IPA by ichitaso lets you disable automatic iOS updates on iPhone and iPad running iOS 9 through the latest iOS 26+ versions.

You can easily install it using TrollStore or an OTA Update Blocker profile — no jailbreak required.

Originally, OTADisabler only worked on jailbroken devices, but newer versions now support non-jailbroken installation methods as well.

If your device is jailbroken, you can also install OTADisabler through package managers like Sileo , Zebra , or Cydia by adding the Ichitaso repository.

Download OTADisabler IPA on your computer and easily install it on your iPhone or iPad using popular sideload tools like SideStore , iLoader , Impactor , Feather, or MapleSign — no jailbreak required.

v 1.2.0

Want the latest updates, new releases, and support? Join our Telegram channel and stay connected! 👉 Join us on Telegram

Here’s a simple guide to using the BlockOTA Beta Profile to stop OTA updates on your device. No jailbreak is needed, and it works on iOS 9 to iOS 26+.

Step 01. Open Safari on your iPhone or iPad and tap the provided button.

Step 02. When prompted with “This website is trying to download a configuration profile,” tap Allow to proceed.

Step 03. Go to the Settings app, find the new Profile Downloaded section, and tap on it.

Step 04. Open the Install Profile screen for the downloaded TVOS 18 Beta Software Profile. It should be signed with an AppleCare certificate.

Step 05. Tap Install and enter your passcode if required.

Step 06. Confirm the installation by tapping Install again.

Restart your device when prompted to apply changes and disable iOS updates.

After restarting, check if updates are disabled by opening Settings → General → Software Update . If it says “iOS is up to date,” the profile is successfully blocking updates.

If you want to enable updates again, follow these steps. Be cautious, as removing the profile may allow your device to update to newer firmware, potentially impacting jailbreak options.

OTADisabler by @ichitaso is a tool for blocking OTA updates on iOS 14 to iOS 18+. It works exclusively with TrollStore. Other tools like Sideloadly, AltStore, or Esign won’t block OTA updates, so TrollStore is recommended.

Step 04. Import the OTADisabler IPA into TrollStore.

Step 05. Proceed with the installation.

Step 06. Open the Settings app and go to Privacy & Security .

Step 07. In the Security section, enable Developer Mode and restart your device.

Step 08. Connect your device to a PC or Mac to turn on Developer Mode.

Step 09. Launch OTADisabler from your Home Screen.

With OTADisabler installed, your device will block OTA updates, ensuring your firmware remains unchanged.

🔹 Key Features:

Get UI Speed IPA now and take your iPhone or iPad to the next level!

Download UI Speed IPA from your computer to install it using Altstore, Sideloadly, TrollStore, Scarlet, e-Sign, 3uTools, or MapleSign.

v 1.0.1

Step 01. install AltStore on your iOS device.

Step 02. Download the UI Speed IPA file.

Open the AltStore app on your device and go to the “My Apps” tab.

Step 03. Tap on the plus “+” icon at the top, then browse and select the UI Speed IPA file that you downloaded.

Step 04. If it’s your first time using AltStore, you will be asked to enter your Apple ID and password. AltStore requires it to sign the app so it can be installed. We recommend you use a burner account.

Step 01. Download the latest version of Sideloadly for Windows or macOS and install it on your PC.

Step 02. Download the UI Speed IPA file from this page and save it to your computer.

Step 03. Connect your iOS device to your computer using a USB cable.

Step 04. Open the Sideloadly app on your PC.

You may be prompted to install the Mail Plug-in. Click the “Yes” button to continue.

Enter your Apple ID email under the “Apple account” field.

Step 05. Drag and drop the UI Speed IPA file into the IPA field shown on the left side of the interface. The field is represented by an IPA image.

Step 06. Click the “Start” button to begin the sideloading and installing the IPA.

When prompted, enter your Apple ID password. The tool uses your Apple ID to sideload the app. We recommend you use a burner account.

Step 07. Sideloadly will begin installing UI Speed IPA on your iOS device.

Step 08. Once the app is installed, don’t open it yet. You must first verify your Apple ID profile if it’s your first time using Sideloadly. To do it, go to Settings > General > Device Management. Tap on your Apple ID and press the Trust button. Tap on Trust again from the popup alert.

Step 09. Now go to the Home screen to open the installed app.

name: AirTroller
subtitle: AirDrop is a fun spammer/flooder for TrollStore devices, perfect for pranking your friends!
description:
AirTroller – AirDrop Flooder for iOS 14 to 15.7.1 (TrollStore Support)

AirTroller is a fun AirDrop prank tool built for TrollStore-supported devices. It works by quickly sending and canceling AirDrop requests just as the recipient receives them—flooding their screen without sending actual files. It’s great for harmless fun with friends on iOS 14 to iOS 15.7.1.

Yes! AirTroller was initially set to be released as a $4.99 paid tweak due to the time and effort invested in its development. However, since iOS 16 introduced stronger AirDrop protections (like auto-decline), the tweak’s impact was reduced. It still works well on iOS 14 – 15.7.1, and if you find it useful, donations are always welcome!

You can get AirTroller IPA directly on your iPhone or iPad using the Senumy IPA Store.

Download Twitch AdBlock IPA from your computer to install it using Altstore, Sideloadly, TrollStore, Scarlet, e-Sign, 3uTools, or MapleSign.

Step 02. Download the Twitch AdBlock IPA file.

Open the AltStore app on your device and go to the “My Apps” tab.

Step 03. Tap on the plus “+” icon at the top, then browse and select the Twitch AdBlock IPA file that you downloaded.

Step 04. If it’s your first time using AltStore, you will be asked to enter your Apple ID and password. AltStore requires it to sign the app so it can be installed. We recommend you use a burner account.

Step 03. Connect your iOS device to your computer using a USB cable.

Step 04. Open the Sideloadly app on your PC.

Whether you’re a developer or just exploring iOS customization, DebtoIPA lets you turn jailbreak tweak packages into TrollStore-compatible IPAs — all without needing a jailbreak.

name: UTM
subtitle: UTM is a full-featured system emulator and virtual machine host for iOS and macOS.
description:
UTM – Run Full Operating Systems on iOS & macOS

UTM is a powerful virtual machine app that brings full system emulation to your iPhone, iPad, and Mac. Built on top of QEMU, it lets you run Windows, Linux, Android, and more from your device. No external computer is required.

You can create, manage, and run virtual machines directly on your iPhone, iPad, or Mac using UTM’s modern interface.

UTM SE (Slow Edition) is a version of UTM designed for non-jailbroken devices . It skips the need for JIT (just-in-time) code execution by using a threaded interpreter instead. That means it’s slower than full UTM, but still very usable—and it can be sideloaded like any regular app.

Included CPU architectures in UTM SE: ✅ ARM ✅ PPC ✅ RISC-V ✅ x86 (32-bit & 64-bit)

No jailbreak? No problem.

Download uYouPlus IPA from your computer to install it using Altstore, Sideloadly, TrollStore, Scarlet, e-Sign, 3uTools, or MapleSign.

You may be prompted to install the Mail Plug-in. Click the “Yes” button to continue.

Step 05. Drag and drop the uYouPlus IPA file into the IPA field shown on the left side of the interface. The field is represented by an IPA image.

Step 06. Click the “Start” button to begin the sideloading and installing the IPA.

Step 08. Once the app is installed, don’t open it yet. You must first verify your Apple ID profile if it’s your first time using Sideloadly. To do it, go to Settings > General > Device Management. Tap on your Apple ID and press the Trust button. Tap on Trust again from the popup alert.

Step 09. Now go to the Home screen to open the installed app.
